title: 第2周 第2天 — 情态动词的法律含义（Shall, May & Must in Contracts）
objective: 学习目标：掌握合同中 shall / may / must / will / should 等情态动词的法律含义区分，理解“义务”“权利”“强制要求”在合同语言中的精确表达，学会在真实合同条款中正确识别各方的权利与义务。
intro: 上节回顾：上周（第1周）我们完成了合同基础与结构的学习。第5天学习了合同生效与期限相关术语：effective date、term、commencement、expiration、renewal、termination、survival、notwithstanding。第6天进行了综合复习，重点攻克了错题。今天我们进入第2周——权利与义务条款，从合同中最核心的情态动词开始。

blocks.html:
上周待复习错题提醒：
  • operative provisions = 实质条款（非“执行条款”）
  • in full force and effect = 完全有效（不可简化）
  • held to be = 被裁定为（非“被认为”）——法律中 hold = 裁定
  • attached hereto = 附于本协议的（here- 家族词不可省略）
  • the premises = 上述事项（合同中非“房屋”）

今天的练习题中将包含上述错题的复习，请特别留意。

sections.heading: 1. 核心词汇
rows: shall
aux. 应；应当（表法律义务）
The Provider shall deliver...
aux. 可以；有权（表权利/许可）
The Client may terminate...
aux. 必须（表强制要求/条件）
All notices must be in writing.
aux. 将（表未来事实/陈述）
The contract will expire on...
aux. 应该（表建议，非强制）
Parties should endeavor to...
contractual obligation 合同义务
duty of care 注意义务
contractual right 合同权利
entitlement to compensation 获得补偿的权利
at its sole discretion 由其自行决定
mandatory requirement 强制要求
compulsory arbitration 强制仲裁
legally binding 具有法律约束力的
enforceable
adj. 可执行的；可强制执行的
legally enforceable 具有法律执行力的
prior written consent 事先书面同意
at one's sole discretion
at the Buyer's sole discretion
is entitled to receive payment
shall be obligated to
比 shall 更强调义务的强制性
shall have the right to
用 shall 搭配 right，赋予一方权利
may at its option
强调选择权在该方手中
must comply with
通常用于法律法规层面的强制要求
is required to
与 shall 类似，表义务
at the sole discretion of
sole 强调排他性，仅由该方决定
with the prior written consent of
限制条件：需要提前、以书面形式获得同意
shall not unreasonably withhold
常用于要求一方合理行使同意权

blocks.html: 1. The Contractor shall be obligated to complete the work within the specified timeframe. — 承包商有义务在规定的时间范围内完成工作。
2. The Licensor shall have the right to audit the Licensee's records at any time. — 许可方有权随时审计被许可方的记录。
3. The Company may at its option terminate this Agreement upon thirty days' written notice. — 公司可自行选择在提前三十天书面通知后终止本协议。
4. Each Party must comply with all applicable laws and regulations. — 各方必须遵守所有适用的法律法规。
5. No assignment shall be effective without the prior written consent of the other Party, which consent shall not be unreasonably withheld. — 未经另一方事先书面同意（该同意不得被无理拒绝），任何转让均不生效。

blocks.text: 3a. shall vs. will vs. must

blocks.html: 这是法律英语中最关键的辨析之一。三个词在日常英语中含义重叠，但在合同中含义截然不同：

rows: shall
义务（obligation）——“应当做”
约定当事人必须履行的行为
描述将要发生的客观事实
法规要求或不可缺少的条件

blocks.html:
关键区别：
  • shall 创设合同义务——违反 shall 可构成违约（breach of contract）。
  • will 仅描述未来事实——不创设义务。例如：This Agreement will expire on December 31（描述事实）vs. The Seller shall deliver the goods by December 31（创设义务）。
  • must 表示先决条件或法律规定的强制要求——通常不用于约定双方义务，而用于陈述不可变更的条件。
1. The Seller shall deliver the goods within ten business days. — 卖方应在十个工作日内交付货物。（shall = 合同义务）
2. This Agreement will terminate automatically upon the occurrence of the Trigger Event. — 触发事件发生后，本协议将自动终止。（will = 事实描述）
3. All notices must be in writing and delivered to the addresses set forth herein. — 所有通知必须以书面形式发出并送达本协议规定的地址。（must = 强制条件）
中文母语者常见错误：把 shall 翻译为“将”或“会”。在合同中，shall 绝不是简单的将来时标志，而是表示法律义务。正确翻译为“应”“应当”“须”。

blocks.text: 3b. may vs. can

rows: 合同中标准用词，表示授予权利或许可
合同中几乎不用 can，因为它表示客观能力而非法律许可

blocks.html: 1. Either Party may terminate this Agreement for cause. — 任一方有权因故终止本协议。（may = 权利）
注意：“may not” 在合同中 = “不得”（禁止），而非“可能不”。例如：The Licensee may not sublicense... = 被许可方不得再许可……

blocks.text: 3c. obligation vs. duty

rows: 更常用于合同语境，指因合同而产生的义务
更常用于法律原则，如 duty of care（注意义务）、fiduciary duty（信义义务）

blocks.html: 简言之：obligation 偏“约定义务”，duty 偏“法定义务”。实务中两者常互换使用。

blocks.text: 3d. binding vs. enforceable

rows: 强调合同对当事人有约束力，双方须遵守
enforceable
可执行的；可强制执行的
强调在法律程序中可被法院强制执行

blocks.html: 一份合同可以是 binding（双方受其约束）但不一定 enforceable（如因违反公共政策而无法强制执行）。反过来，enforceable 的前提通常是 binding。
1. This Agreement shall be binding upon and inure to the benefit of the Parties and their respective successors. — 本协议对各方及其各自的继承人具有约束力并使其受益。
2. If any provision is held to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect. — 如任何条款被裁定为不可执行的，其余条款应保持完全有效。
错题复习：上例中注意 “held to be” = 被裁定为（非“被认为”），以及 “in full force and effect” = 完全有效（不可简化为“有效”）。这两个知识点在第1周练习中出错，请牢记。

items.title: 例句 1
items.sentence: The Provider shall, at its sole cost and expense, perform the Services in accordance with the specifications set forth in Exhibit A attached hereto, and shall comply with all applicable laws, rules, and regulations.
structure: The Provider shall ... perform the Services — 主句：提供方应履行服务（shall = 义务）
at its sole cost and expense — 插入语，表示费用由提供方自行承担
in accordance with the specifications — 方式状语，根据规格标准
set forth in Exhibit A attached hereto — 过去分词短语修饰 specifications，“载于附于本协议的附件A中”
and shall comply with all applicable laws, rules, and regulations — 并列的第二个 shall 义务
items.translation: 提供方应自费按照附于本协议的附件A中所列规格履行服务，并应遵守所有适用的法律、规则和法规。
items.note: 错题复习：注意 “attached hereto” = 附于本协议的，不可省略为“附件”或“附上的”。

items.title: 例句 2
items.sentence: The Receiving Party may not disclose any Confidential Information to any third party without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party, which consent shall not be unreasonably withheld, conditioned, or delayed.
structure: The Receiving Party may not disclose — 主句：接收方不得披露（may not = 禁止）
any Confidential Information to any third party — 宾语：任何保密信息给任何第三方
without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party — 条件：未经披露方事先书面同意
which consent shall not be unreasonably withheld, conditioned, or delayed — 非限制性定语从句修饰 consent，该同意不得被无理拒绝、附加条件或拖延
items.translation: 未经披露方事先书面同意（该同意不得被无理拒绝、附加条件或拖延），接收方不得向任何第三方披露任何保密信息。

items.title: 例句 3
items.sentence: Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained herein, either Party shall have the right to terminate this Agreement immediately upon written notice if the other Party is in material breach of any of its obligations hereunder and fails to cure such breach within thirty (30) days after receipt of written notice thereof.
structure: Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained herein — 让步状语：“尽管本协议中有任何相反规定”
either Party shall have the right to terminate — 主句：任一方有权终止（shall have the right = 权利）
immediately upon written notice — 时间条件：在书面通知后立即
if the other Party is in material breach — 条件从句1：如果另一方存在重大违约
of any of its obligations hereunder — 修饰 breach：违反其在本协议项下的任何义务
and fails to cure such breach within thirty (30) days — 条件从句2（并列）：且未能在三十天内纠正该违约
after receipt of written notice thereof — 时间起点：在收到书面通知之后
items.translation: 尽管本协议中有任何相反规定，如另一方严重违反其在本协议项下的任何义务，且在收到相关书面通知后三十（30）日内未能纠正该违约行为，任一方有权立即书面通知终止本协议。
items.note: 知识点整合：这一句同时出现了 notwithstanding（第1周第5天所学）、shall have the right to（本课新搭配）、material breach（重大违约）和 hereunder（here- 家族词 = under this Agreement），是综合运用的好范例。

blocks.html: 看到英文术语，想一想中文意思，然后点击展开答案：

shall
应；应当（合同中表法律义务）
may
可以；有权（表权利/许可）
must
必须（表强制要求/先决条件）
will
将（表未来事实/陈述，不创设义务）
should
应该（表建议，非法律强制）
obligation
义务（合同约定的）
duty
责任；职责（偏法定义务）
right
权利
entitlement
权利；资格
discretion
自由裁量权
mandatory
强制性的
compulsory
强制的；义务的
binding
有约束力的
enforceable
可执行的；可强制执行的
consent
同意；许可
at one's sole discretion
由某方自行决定
is entitled to
有权……

sections.heading: 5b. 配对选择：看中文选英文

questions.prompt: 1. 义务（合同约定的）
questions.explanation: obligation = 义务（合同约定的义务）

questions.prompt: 2. 自由裁量权
questions.explanation: discretion = 自由裁量权，常见搭配：at one's sole discretion

questions.prompt: 3. 可强制执行的
questions.explanation: enforceable = 可执行的/可强制执行的，强调法院可以强制执行

questions.prompt: 4. 同意；许可
questions.explanation: consent = 同意/许可，常见搭配：prior written consent 事先书面同意

questions.prompt: 5. 强制的；义务的
questions.explanation: compulsory = 强制的/义务的，常见搭配：compulsory arbitration 强制仲裁

questions.prompt: 1. The Seller ____ deliver the goods within ten (10) business days after receipt of the purchase order.
options: shall
questions.answer: shall
questions.explanation: shall 在合同中表示法律义务，The Seller shall deliver = 卖方应交付。

questions.prompt: 2. The Client ____ terminate this Agreement upon sixty (60) days' prior written notice.
options: shall
questions.explanation: may 表示权利/许可。The Client may terminate = 客户有权终止。

questions.prompt: 3. All modifications to this Agreement ____ be in writing and signed by both Parties.
questions.explanation: must 表示强制条件。All modifications must be in writing = 所有修改必须以书面形式作出。

questions.prompt: 4. This Agreement ____ expire on December 31, 2027, unless renewed in accordance with Section 5.
options: shall
questions.explanation: will 在合同中表示未来事实的陈述，不创设义务。This Agreement will expire = 本协议将到期。

questions.prompt: 5. The Licensee ____ sublicense, assign, or transfer any rights granted hereunder without the Licensor's prior written consent.
options: shall not
may not
will not
questions.answer: may not
questions.explanation: may not 在合同中 = 不得（禁止）。The Licensee may not sublicense = 被许可方不得再许可。

groups.title: 练习B：选词填空（合同语境）

questions.prompt: 1. This Agreement shall constitute a legally ____ contract between the Parties.
questions.explanation: legally binding = 具有法律约束力的，是法律英语固定搭配。

questions.prompt: 2. No Party shall assign this Agreement without the prior written ____ of the other Party.
questions.explanation: prior written consent = 事先书面同意，合同中限制转让或披露的标准用语。

questions.prompt: 3. Upon completion of the Services, the Provider shall be ____ to receive payment in full.
questions.explanation: is entitled to = 有权。The Seller is entitled to receive payment = 卖方有权收取款项。

questions.prompt: 4. The Company may, ____, extend the deadline by an additional thirty (30) days.
options: at its sole discretion
questions.answer: at its sole discretion
questions.explanation: at its sole discretion = 由其自行决定，sole 强调排他性。

questions.prompt: 5. Each Party shall perform its ____ under the operative provisions of this Agreement in good faith.（提示：operative provisions = 实质条款）
questions.explanation: perform one's obligations = 履行义务，obligation 更常用于合同约定的义务。错题复习：operative provisions = 实质条款。

questions.prompt: 1. 在合同中，shall 的核心法律功能是什么？
questions.explanation: shall 在合同中的核心功能是创设法律义务，违反 shall 条款可构成违约。

questions.prompt: 2. “The Contractor may not subcontract any portion of the work.” 中 may not 的意思是：
questions.explanation: may not 在合同中 = 不得/禁止，而非日常英语中的‘可能不’。

questions.prompt: 3.【错题复习】“If any provision of this Agreement is held to be invalid...” 中 held to be 应译为：
questions.explanation: held to be = 被裁定为/被判定为（法律语境中 hold = 裁定），不能翻译为‘被认为’。这是第1周的错题。

questions.prompt: 4. 以下关于 binding 与 enforceable 的说法，正确的是：
options: 两者完全同义，可随意互换
合同可以是 binding 但不一定 enforceable
enforceable 的语义弱于 binding
questions.answer: 合同可以是 binding 但不一定 enforceable
questions.explanation: binding 强调约束力，enforceable 强调法院可强制执行。合同可以有约束力但因某些原因（如违反公共政策）不可执行。

questions.prompt: 5.【错题复习】合同前言中 “NOW THEREFORE, in consideration of the premises and the mutual covenants herein...” 中 the premises 的意思是：
questions.explanation: the premises 在合同前言中 = 上述事项（即前面提到的各项背景），不是‘房屋’。这是第1周的错题。

questions.source: 1. The Supplier shall perform its obligations hereunder in a professional and workmanlike manner and shall comply with all mandatory requirements set forth in the operative provisions of this Agreement.
questions.reference: 供应商应以专业、精良的方式履行其在本协议项下的义务，并应遵守本协议实质条款中规定的所有强制性要求。

rubric.en: shall perform
rubric.note: shall = 法律义务，译为"应/应当"，不是"将"
obligations = 义务（合同术语）
hereunder = under this Agreement，here- 家族词不可省略

rubric.en: in a professional and workmanlike manner
rubric.note: workmanlike = 精良的/工匠般的，不可漏译
mandatory = 强制性的
错题复习：operative provisions = 实质条款，不是"执行条款"

questions.source: 2. Either Party may terminate this Agreement at its sole discretion upon ninety (90) days' prior written notice, provided that all binding obligations that have accrued prior to the effective date of termination shall survive such termination and remain in full force and effect.
questions.reference: 任一方有权在提前九十（90）天书面通知后自行决定终止本协议，但在终止生效日之前已产生的所有有约束力的义务在终止后继续存续，并保持完全有效。

rubric.en: may terminate
rubric.note: may = 权利/许可，不是义务

rubric.en: at its sole discretion
rubric.ideal: 自行决定/由其自行决定
rubric.note: sole discretion = 自行决定（排他性裁量权）

rubric.ideal: 事先书面通知/提前书面通知
rubric.note: prior + written 两个修饰语都应体现

rubric.en: binding obligations
rubric.note: binding = 有约束力的

accept: 于该等终止后仍然有效
rubric.note: survive 法律含义 = 继续存续/继续有效

rubric.en: in full force and effect
rubric.note: 错题复习：in full force and effect 不可简化为"有效"

questions.source: 1. 未经甲方事先书面同意（该同意不得被无理拒绝），乙方不得将其在本协议项下的任何权利或义务转让给第三方。
questions.reference: Party B may not assign any of its rights or obligations hereunder to any third party without the prior written consent of Party A, which consent shall not be unreasonably withheld.

rubric.en: may not assign
rubric.ideal: may not assign
accept: shall not assign
wrong: will not assign
rubric.note: 不得 = may not 或 shall not（合同标准表达）

rubric.en: rights or obligations
rubric.ideal: rights or obligations
accept: rights and obligations
rubric.note: 权利或义务 = rights or obligations
在本协议项下 = hereunder / under this Agreement

accept: written consent in advance
rubric.note: 事先书面同意 = prior written consent（三个词缺一不可）

rubric.en: shall not be unreasonably withheld
rubric.ideal: shall not be unreasonably withheld
accept: which consent shall not be unreasonably withheld
rubric.note: 不得被无理拒绝 = shall not be unreasonably withheld（固定搭配）

sections.heading: 7. 今日小结
sections.title: 本课要点
points:
情态动词的法律含义：
  • shall = 法律义务（“应/应当”），违反可构成违约
  • may = 权利/许可（“可以/有权”）；may not = 禁止（“不得”）
  • must = 强制条件/先决要求（“必须”）
  • will = 未来事实陈述（“将”），不创设义务
  • should = 建议性（“应该”），非强制

核心搭配：
  • shall be obligated to（有义务）/ shall have the right to（有权）
  • at one's sole discretion（自行决定）/ with the prior written consent of（经事先书面同意）
  • shall not unreasonably withhold（不得无理拒绝）

关键辨析：
  • obligation（合同义务）vs. duty（法定职责）
  • binding（有约束力）vs. enforceable（可强制执行）
  • mandatory（强制性的，合同用）vs. compulsory（强制的，法规用）
错题巩固：复习了 operative provisions、in full force and effect、held to be、attached hereto、the premises 等易错点。
sections.next: 明日预告：第2周第2天将学习 保证与陈述条款（Representations & Warranties），掌握 represent、warrant、covenant、undertake 等核心术语。
